data.linkedin_connect_message: Hi Daniel, this is Bill, CEO of Socialhub.AI. We're hosting a small invite-only executive roundtable with Microsoft in Redmond on May 22, focused on AI in retail - turning experiments into measurable value. Only 12 seats. Would you be open to joining? Happy to share details.
data.linkedin_inmail_message:
Hi Daniel,

I came across your profile and thought this roundtable may be relevant to your work in retail / digital transformation. We are hosting a small, invite-only executive roundtable in Seattle on May 22, together with the Microsoft team, focused on AI Frontier for Retail - how retail and consumer businesses can move beyond AI experimentation and translate customer intelligence into measurable commercial impact.

This session is designed for CEOs, CTOs, and senior digital, technology, and business leaders to exchange practical perspectives in a focused setting. We are keeping the group intentionally small, with only 12 seats, to ensure a meaningful and candid discussion.

The session will feature opening perspectives from:
Bill Huang, Socialhub.AI
David Hsieh, Microsoft
Annie Ho, Capgemini

This will be our fourth executive session this year, following previous discussions in New York, Seattle, and Hong Kong.

If this topic is relevant to your current priorities, we would be delighted to invite you to join us.

Event details:
Date: Friday, May 22, 2026
Time: 1:30 PM - 5:00 PM PT
Venue: Microsoft Building 6, 15745 NE 36th St, Redmond, WA 98052

Please let me know if you would be interested, and I would be happy to share the invitation details.

Best regards,
Bill Huang
Socialhub.AI CEO

data.linkedin_connect_message: Hi Amy, this is Bill, CEO of Socialhub.AI. We're hosting a small invite-only executive roundtable with Microsoft in Redmond on May 22, focused on AI in retail - turning experiments into measurable value. Only 12 seats. Would you be open to joining? Happy to share details.
data.linkedin_inmail_message:
Hi Amy,

I came across your profile and thought this roundtable may be relevant to your work in retail / digital transformation. We are hosting a small, invite-only executive roundtable in Seattle on May 22, together with the Microsoft team, focused on AI Frontier for Retail - how retail and consumer businesses can move beyond AI experimentation and translate customer intelligence into measurable commercial impact.

This session is designed for CEOs, CTOs, and senior digital, technology, and business leaders to exchange practical perspectives in a focused setting. We are keeping the group intentionally small, with only 12 seats, to ensure a meaningful and candid discussion.

The session will feature opening perspectives from:
Bill Huang, Socialhub.AI
David Hsieh, Microsoft
Annie Ho, Capgemini

This will be our fourth executive session this year, following previous discussions in New York, Seattle, and Hong Kong.

If this topic is relevant to your current priorities, we would be delighted to invite you to join us.

Event details:
Date: Friday, May 22, 2026
Time: 1:30 PM - 5:00 PM PT
Venue: Microsoft Building 6, 15745 NE 36th St, Redmond, WA 98052

Please let me know if you would be interested, and I would be happy to share the invitation details.

Best regards,
Bill Huang
Socialhub.AI CEO

We're hosting a small invite-only executive roundtable with Microsoft in Redmond on May 22, focused on AI in retail - turning experiments into measurable value. Only 12 seats. Would you be open to joining? Happy to share details.
data.linkedin_inmail_message:
Hi Scott,

I came across your profile and thought this roundtable may be relevant to your work in retail / digital transformation. We are hosting a small, invite-only executive roundtable in Seattle on May 22, together with the Microsoft team, focused on AI Frontier for Retail - how retail and consumer businesses can move beyond AI experimentation and translate customer intelligence into measurable commercial impact.

This session is designed for CEOs, CTOs, and senior digital, technology, and business leaders to exchange practical perspectives in a focused setting. We are keeping the group intentionally small, with only 12 seats, to ensure a meaningful and candid discussion.

The session will feature opening perspectives from:
Bill Huang, Socialhub.AI
David Hsieh, Microsoft
Annie Ho, Capgemini

This will be our fourth executive session this year, following previous discussions in New York, Seattle, and Hong Kong.

If this topic is relevant to your current priorities, we would be delighted to invite you to join us.

Event details:
Date: Friday, May 22, 2026
Time: 1:30 PM - 5:00 PM PT
Venue: Microsoft Building 6, 15745 NE 36th St, Redmond, WA 98052

Please let me know if you would be interested, and I would be happy to share the invitation details.

Best regards,
Bill Huang
Socialhub.AI CEO

data.linkedin_inmail_message:
Hi Fay,

I came across your profile and thought this roundtable may be relevant to your work in retail / digital transformation. We are hosting a small, invite-only executive roundtable in Seattle on May 22, together with the Microsoft team, focused on AI Frontier for Retail - how retail and consumer businesses can move beyond AI experimentation and translate customer intelligence into measurable commercial impact.

This session is designed for CEOs, CTOs, and senior digital, technology, and business leaders to exchange practical perspectives in a focused setting. We are keeping the group intentionally small, with only 12 seats, to ensure a meaningful and candid discussion.

The session will feature opening perspectives from:
Bill Huang, Socialhub.AI
David Hsieh, Microsoft
Annie Ho, Capgemini

This will be our fourth executive session this year, following previous discussions in New York, Seattle, and Hong Kong.

If this topic is relevant to your current priorities, we would be delighted to invite you to join us.

Event details:
Date: Friday, May 22, 2026
Time: 1:30 PM - 5:00 PM PT
Venue: Microsoft Building 6, 15745 NE 36th St, Redmond, WA 98052

Please let me know if you would be interested, and I would be happy to share the invitation details.

Best regards,
Bill Huang
Socialhub.AI CEO

Hi Jason,

I came across your profile and thought this roundtable may be relevant to your work in retail / digital transformation. We are hosting a small, invite-only executive roundtable in Seattle on May 22, together with the Microsoft team, focused on AI Frontier for Retail - how retail and consumer businesses can move beyond AI experimentation and translate customer intelligence into measurable commercial impact.

This session is designed for CEOs, CTOs, and senior digital, technology, and business leaders to exchange practical perspectives in a focused setting. We are keeping the group intentionally small, with only 12 seats, to ensure a meaningful and candid discussion.

The session will feature opening perspectives from:
Bill Huang, Socialhub.AI
David Hsieh, Microsoft
Annie Ho, Capgemini

This will be our fourth executive session this year, following previous discussions in New York, Seattle, and Hong Kong.

If this topic is relevant to your current priorities, we would be delighted to invite you to join us.

Event details:
Date: Friday, May 22, 2026

Venue: Microsoft Building 6, 15745 NE 36th St, Redmond, WA 98052

Please let me know if you would be interested, and I would be happy to share the invitation details.

Best regards,
Bill Huang

Hi Jordan,

We are hosting a small, invite-only executive roundtable in Seattle on May 22, together with the Microsoft team, focused on AI Frontier for Retail - how retail and consumer businesses can move beyond AI experimentation and translate customer intelligence into measurable commercial impact.

This session is designed for CEOs, CTOs, and senior digital, technology, and business leaders to exchange practical perspectives in a focused setting. We are keeping the group intentionally small, with only 12 seats, to ensure a meaningful and candid discussion.

The session will feature opening perspectives from:

This will be our fourth executive session this year, following previous discussions in New York, Seattle, and Hong Kong.
